did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a traditional image processing method for skin lesion segmentation using inpainting, edge detection, intensity-based thresholding, and mathematical morphological operations. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms to obtain its results; these techniques are only mentioned in the introduction as related work or references.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
